meta.title: Saripati ASIA | Agricultural Commodity Trading
meta.description: B2B sourcing for spices, coconut products, charcoal, coffee, essential oils, and specialty agricultural commodities across Asia.
meta.keywords: commodity trading, spices export, copra, coconut charcoal, robusta coffee, patchouli oil, Indonesia agricultural exports, bulk B2B

hero.title: Trusted supply for global buyers
hero.subtitle: Saripati ASIA connects mills, cooperatives, and packers with roasters, manufacturers, and distributors who need consistent quality at scale.

a.title: QC at origin
a.body: Moisture, admixture, and oil parameters matched to your PO.

b.title: Trade desk
b.body: English & Bahasa Indonesia coordination with mills and labs.

c.title: Pack styles
c.body: Bulk, retail-ready, and private-label formats on request.

d.title: Core lanes
d.body: Spices, coconut derivatives, charcoal, coffee, oils, specialty crops.

quality.title: Export-grade specs
quality.body: Screen sizes, moisture, oil content, and foreign matter controlled to your checklist.

logistics.title: Shipment-ready packing
logistics.body: Jute, PP, vacuum, or industrial formats aligned with port and insurance requirements.

compliance.title: Traceable documentation
compliance.body: Certificates of origin, phytosanitary, and lab tests coordinated with your forwarder.

products.title: Commodity catalog
products.subtitle: Grouped for fast navigation. Tap a category to review grades and local names.
products.subtitleCategories: Browse by category. Each page lists export grades, local trade names, and inquiry paths for that line.

productList.heading: Products in this category
productList.subheading: Select a commodity to view grades, specifications, and request a tailored quote.

productPage.specsIntro: Representative grades and cuts we coordinate with mills and packers. Final specs follow your PO and lab checks.
productPage.specsRowNotes: Bulk formats (jute, PP, paper), moisture, admixture, and certificates matched to your contract.
productPage.specsFootnote: Need a different cut, screen, or destination documentation?
productPage.inquirySubtitle: Tell us volume, destination port, and target parameters. We will confirm availability and indicative terms for this SKU.
